Advanced Momentum Analyzer

OBV + Sortino + Slope Acceleration | 1401 assets | 2026-03-04  |  market-dashboards
Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-04 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Analyzes 700+ assets using OBV divergence detection, Sortino ratios, slope acceleration, and trajectory classification. Produces signals from STRONG_BUY to SELL with confidence scores. OBV divergence flags price-volume disagreements as early warning signals.
Today's Reading
Today's advanced-momentum dashboard reveals a market heavily skewed toward caution, with 644 assets (92% of coverage) in HOLD status, suggesting most securities lack clear directional conviction. However, a notable cluster of V-shaped recovery patterns has emerged, with 282 STRONG_BUY signals concentrated among early-alphabet tickers—ACMR, AEIS, AFK, AEM, AEP, AIA, AG, and AGI all showing 90% confidence scores and identical trajectory classifications. This synchronized pattern across multiple assets with similar naming conventions warrants scrutiny, as it could indicate either a genuine broad-based sector recovery or a potential signal generation artifact. The 367 SELL signals (52% of all actionable signals) represent a substantial bearish contingent that contrasts sharply with the bullish cluster, creating a bifurcated market picture. Overall, today's data suggests selective strength in specific securities rather than broad-market momentum.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
